enhanced_prompt: A realistic modern interior architectural rendering, preserving the original SketchUp geometry, camera angle, spatial layout, scale, openings, and material relationships.
negative_prompt: cluttered space, distorted geometry, unrealistic layout, blurry image, distorted geometry, changed layout, unrealistic proportions, blurry image, low quality
recommendations: Preserve the current camera angle for before-and-after comparison.
Use the Modern Interior style preset as the primary visual direction.
